
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Oma's Toll House Cupcakes.
    Summary: Nathan,

Oma Dianne has some of the best recipes! When she decided to move from her home into assisted living she allowed me to have her recipe cards. I have not made all of them but I can almost guarantee they are the best. Just like you and your soon to be little brother. I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 0.5 cups soft butter, 6 tablespoons sugar, 6 tablespoons brown sugar, 0.5 teaspoons vanilla, 1  egg, 18 tablespoons flour (sifted), 0.5 teaspoons baking soda, 0.5 teaspoons salt, 0.5 cups packed brown sugar, 1  egg, 0.125 teaspoons salt, 1 cups chocolate chips, 0.5 cups nuts, 0.5 teaspoons vanilla
